_comment: L3 conformance — adds §4.1 Pattern objects under memory.learned_patterns. This is the only ARP primitive not inherited from an upstream standard: a stable fingerprint + lifecycle status that lets cross-site collectors deduplicate, age out, and rank patterns from peer sites. L3 is required to participate in cross-site recommendation filtering.

report.summary: p95 latency drift detected; pattern saved for cross-site comparison

warnings.message: p95 jumped from 800ms to 2.1s after worker restart

learned_patterns.detail: Render Standard tier worker swap causes p95 latency to triple for ~90s after deploy. Pre-warming via /health pings every 60s mitigates the drift.
learned_patterns.action: Add a cron-style /health probe every 60s; consider scaling worker count if drift persists.
